added_rules.content: Add a Docker health pre-flight check before running stress test beads — containers may be unhealthy from prior stress runs
When a stress test exposes a missing invariant, create a child bead for the fix rather than bundling the fix into the test bead
Compile all E2E test files after each merge — rapid multi-agent commits break shared type imports silently
Multi-tenant isolation stress tests must be part of every release gate for SaaS platforms, not one-off verification
Every security fix bead must have a paired E2E test bead that proves the fix at the real HTTP boundary — treat this as a hard rule
When stress testing inventory or financial modules, use SELECT FOR UPDATE to guard concurrent mutations — optimistic checks are insufficient
Monitor Docker container health actively during stress test sprints — assign an ops bead to watch containers when 3+ stress tests run concurrently
After fixing DB error sanitization in one module handler, grep for the same pattern across all handlers in that module — leaks cluster
